Class DynamicCommand

java.lang.Object
dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.MagicCommand
dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.commands.DynamicCommand
public final class DynamicCommand extends MagicCommand
Concrete MagicCommand implementation backed by a CommandSpec.
